perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a brightly lit skincare store with three women in their 30s. They appear energetic and happy, examining bath bombs and products. (2) The scene shifts to a toy store where they excitedly show off blind boxes and merchandise featuring Stitch and Doraemon, smiling broadly at the camera. (3) A text-based transition appears. (4) One woman is then seen sitting down on a bench in a shoe store, looking exhausted. (5) The group is shown walking through a mall, then leaning against pillars while focused on their smartphones. (6) One woman leans heavily against a wooden wall near a restaurant with a tired expression. (7) They are shown walking with several shopping bags, appearing weary. (8) The video concludes with two of the women slumped over a dining table in a restaurant, looking sleepy and drained. (9) A final close-up shows a woman's face with a look of mock despair.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music plays as female voices chat excitedly and laugh while shopping. (2) A comical 'whoosh' or transition sound effect occurs. (3) The music changes to a slow, slightly melancholic yet humorous piano melody. (4) Female voices are heard in a more subdued tone, mentioning being tired, needing to find a toilet, wanting to take a taxi instead of walking, and feeling hungry. (5) Sound effects of ambient mall noise and restaurant clatter are audible in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '跟30歲以後女人出門' (Going out with women over 30) - Hook text. (2) '剛出門時' (When just starting out) - Contextual label. (3) '然後就...' (And then...) - Narrative transition. (4) '可以坐就不站' (If they can sit, they won't stand) - Humorous observation. (5) '三不五時廁所' (Going to the bathroom frequently) - Humorous observation. (6) '找機會就玩手機' (Looking for any chance to play on phones) - Humorous observation. (7) '有車就不想走路' (If there's a car, they don't want to walk) - Humorous observation. (8) '總是肚子餓' (Always hungry) - Humorous observation. (9) '吃飽了就想睡' (Wanting to sleep after eating) - Humorous observation. (10) '人生好難' (Life is so hard) - Dramatic humorous conclusion.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (High energy shopping) -> Transition -> Series of 'tired' vignettes (Decreasing energy levels) -> Outro (Post-meal exhaustion).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 3 main female creators, approximately 3 passers-by/staff in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Three women in their 30s wearing stylish, casual urban outfits; one in a blue polka dot top, one in a striped shirt with a red backpack, and one in a black jacket and long skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Modern commercial interiors with shelves of products, bright display lighting, mall corridors, and a restaurant booth.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio-like retail lighting transitioning to softer restaurant lighting.

vocal_qualities.tone: Varies from excited and high-pitched to weary and complaining

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Contrast (Before vs. After) -> Relatable vignettes.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To create a relatable and humorous vlog-style commentary on the physical stamina and behavioral changes of women in their 30s during a shopping outing. It contrasts initial excitement with the inevitable exhaustion and physiological needs that arise later in the day.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While products are shown, the focus is on the humor of the situation rather than promoting a specific brand.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of rhythmic text overlays to punctuate specific comedic observations about age-related behavior.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a very popular TikTok/Reels trend style involving 'expectations vs reality' or 'before and after' tropes to engage a specific demographic (urban women).
